_meta.description: Platform-wide config that's not country-specific. Adding a new language, retuning verdict thresholds, or relabelling sectors is JSON-only — no code change.

verdict_thresholds._description: Boundaries for the automation-risk verdict bucket. score < mostly_safe_max -> mostly_safe; < watch_max -> watch; else act_now.

sector_translations._description: Slug -> friendly noun phrase per language. Used by the matcher prompt's 'sector_growth' field instruction. For languages not listed here, Sonnet falls back to translating the English version on the fly.

opportunity_type_metadata._description: Every type that any country can surface. Per-country availability is set in countries.<CC>.opportunity_types — that list is what gets passed into the matcher prompt.
